tasks.subject: Task 1: Spike — confirm parallel Task subagents in claude-code-action
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Empirically confirm whether claude-code-action runs Task subagents in parallel over a shared workspace, before investing in the orchestrator prompt. Only total failure of the Task tool is blocking; parallel-vs-sequential just tunes Task 2 wording.

**Files:**
- Create (throwaway scratch branch only, never merged): .github/workflows/_fanout-spike.yml

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Spike runs to completion on scratch branch autofix-fanout-spike (push-triggered, no main involvement)
- [ ] Log shows 3 Task subagents + scratch/sub-1.txt, sub-2.txt, sub-3.txt created
- [ ] Finding recorded: parallel or sequential
- [ ] Scratch branch + workflow deleted afterward (no residue)

**Verify:** gh run list --branch autofix-fanout-spike --workflow=_fanout-spike.yml shows one completed/success run.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/_fanout-spike.yml"], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --branch autofix-fanout-spike --workflow=_fanout-spike.yml --json conclusion", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spike run completes on scratch branch", "logs show 3 Task subagents + 3 files created", "parallel-vs-sequential finding recorded", "scratch branch + workflow deleted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement fanout in claude-autofix.yml initiate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the LARGE branch of initiate's prompt with decompose -> parallel-subagents -> integrate -> one-PR; enable Task; bump turns; add the N cap. CONTAINED path byte-identical.

**Files:**
- Modify: .github/workflows/claude-autofix.yml (initiate job: claude_args, prompt LARGE branch, new job env FANOUT_MAX_PIECES)
- Modify: RELEASING.md (short fanout note)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] initiate gains env FANOUT_MAX_PIECES set to 5
- [ ] --allowedTools includes Task (Edit,Read,Write,Bash,Task)
- [ ] --max-turns raised 60 -> 100
- [ ] LARGE branch fans out per spec (decompose <= N disjoint-scope pieces, post plan, create auto-fix/<issue>, spawn subagent per piece via Task, integration pass + npm test to green, open ONE PR; retry-once/never-drop; too-tangled -> plan+STOP)
- [ ] CONTAINED branch + label step + error-report step + revise job unchanged
- [ ] RELEASING.md documents fanout (one integrated PR, still needs approval)

**Verify:** actionlint .github/workflows/claude-autofix.yml (and CI workflow-lint green on the PR); manual read confirms LARGE fans out + CONTAINED unchanged.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/claude-autofix.yml", "RELEASING.md"], "verifyCommand": "actionlint .github/workflows/claude-autofix.yml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FANOUT_MAX_PIECES env added", "Task in allowedTools", "max-turns 60->100", "LARGE branch fans out per spec", "CONTAINED + downstream unchanged", "RELEASING.md fanout note"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: End-to-end validation on a real large issue (USER GATE)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the whole fanout path works on a real large issue: auto-detect -> fan out into multiple pieces -> one integrated PR -> QA loop -> maintainer approval -> CI Gate -> merge, with no release to users.

> **USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in the current conversation. MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, declaring it verified inline, or substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** none (operational validation against the live workflow).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Large issue labeled auto-fix (candidate: configurable Nexus download-folder behind #55)
- [ ] Run FANNED OUT: piece-plan issue comment + multiple Task subagents in the run log (not single-pass)
- [ ] Exactly one PR on auto-fix/<issue>, pieces integrated, full suite green
- [ ] Through gate: qa -> QA loop -> maintainer approval -> CI Gate green -> merged
- [ ] No release: latest GitHub release tag unchanged after merge

**Verify:** gh pr view <pr> --json state,mergedAt shows MERGED; gh release view --json tagName unchanged from before the run.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh pr view PR --json state,mergedAt && gh release view --json tagName", "acceptanceCriteria": ["large issue labeled auto-fix", "run fanned out: plan comment + multiple subagents", "one integrated PR, suite green", "through gate: qa->approval->CI Gate->merged", "no release: release tag unchanged"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["fanout", "fan-out", "subagents"], ["merged", "no-release"]]}
```
